outfit_info.outfit_description: A model wears a light-colored polo shirt layered under a vibrant green puffer vest. Black straight jeans are paired with sturdy combat boots. A sleek black messenger bag and a bold logo belt complete this contemporary and practical ensemble. The look projects a casual yet stylish urban appeal.

model_attributes.body: The model has a lean and athletic physique, exuding a confident and engaging demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: The model is captured actively riding a unicycle, leaning forward slightly with hands on the handlebars, conveying movement.
model_attributes.background: A vibrant nocturnal carnival scene, featuring a brightly lit Ferris wheel and blurred figures, creating a dynamic backdrop.

outfit.P01138442: blue linen and cotton polo shirt
